mapper.select: select id, period, staff_no, staff_name, branch_code, branch_name, key_work_perf, network_eval_perf, special_bonus, total_amount, promotion, account, cheok, bill, cash, score, create_time from tb_staff_performance where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_staff_performance(period, staff_no, staff_name, branch_code, branch_name, key_work_perf, network_eval_perf, special_bonus, total_amount, promotion, account, cheok, bill, cash, score, create_time) values (#{period}, #{staffNo}, #{staffName}, #{branchCode}, #{branchName}, #{keyWorkPerf}, #{networkEvalPerf}, #{specialBonus}, #{totalAmount}, #{promotion}, #{account}, #{cheok}, #{bill}, #{cash}, #{score}, #{createTime})

insert into tb_staff_performance(period, staff_no, staff_name, branch_code, branch_name, key_work_perf, network_eval_perf, special_bonus, total_amount, promotion, account, cheok, bill, cash, score, create_time) values
(#{entity.period}, #{entity.staffNo}, #{entity.staffName}, #{entity.branchCode}, #{entity.branchName}, #{entity.keyWorkPerf}, #{entity.networkEvalPerf}, #{entity.specialBonus}, #{entity.totalAmount}, #{entity.promotion}, #{entity.account}, #{entity.cheok}, #{entity.bill}, #{entity.cash}, #{entity.score}, #{entity.createTime})

insert into tb_staff_performance(period, staff_no, staff_name, branch_code, branch_name, key_work_perf, network_eval_perf, special_bonus, total_amount, promotion, account, cheok, bill, cash, score, create_time) values
(#{entity.period}, #{entity.staffNo}, #{entity.staffName}, #{entity.branchCode}, #{entity.branchName}, #{entity.keyWorkPerf}, #{entity.networkEvalPerf}, #{entity.specialBonus}, #{entity.totalAmount}, #{entity.promotion}, #{entity.account}, #{entity.cheok}, #{entity.bill}, #{entity.cash}, #{entity.score}, #{entity.createTime})
on duplicate key update period = values(period), staff_no = values(staff_no), staff_name = values(staff_name), branch_code = values(branch_code), branch_name = values(branch_name), key_work_perf = values(key_work_perf), network_eval_perf = values(network_eval_perf), special_bonus = values(special_bonus), total_amount = values(total_amount), promotion = values(promotion), account = values(account), cheok = values(cheok), bill = values(bill), cash = values(cash), score = values(score), create_time = values(create_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_staff_performance
period = #{period},
staff_no = #{staffNo},
staff_name = #{staffName},
branch_code = #{branchCode},
branch_name = #{branchName},
key_work_perf = #{keyWorkPerf},
network_eval_perf = #{networkEvalPerf},
special_bonus = #{specialBonus},
total_amount = #{totalAmount},
promotion = #{promotion},
account = #{account},
cheok = #{cheok},
bill = #{bill},
cash = #{cash},
score = #{score},
create_time = #{createTime},
where id = #{id}
